data.title: Q4 2025 financial results showcased strong growth, with revenue up by 15% and profits increasing by 20% compared to the previous quarter.
data.description: The number of COVID-19 cases continues to rise, with an increase of 500 new infections reported today. The total number of confirmed cases now stands at 10,000. In addition, there have been 20 new deaths, bringing the total number of fatalities to 250. The government is urging the public to adhere to safety measures to curb the spread of the virus.
iAnthus releases financial results for Q4 and FY2025, showcasing revenue of $50 million.

data.title: Meta And Reddit Stocks Are Slumping Despite Strong Digital Ad Growth. Here's Why.
data.description: Despite experiencing strong growth in digital advertising, Meta stock, previously known for its Magnificent Seven shine, is now losing its luster. Similarly, Reddit stock, following its blockbuster IPO, is also on the decline. The significant decrease in their performance is surprising given the overall positive trend in the digital advertising sector.

data.title: Guardian Capital Group Limited Announces Expected Closing Date For Take-Private Transaction With Desjardins
data.description: Toronto, 20th March 2026 - Guardian Capital Group Limited (Guardian) (TSX: GCG) (TSX: GCG.A) has successfully obtained all necessary regulatory approvals to finalize the previously-announced statutory plan of arrangement under the Business Corporations Act (Ontario) known as the Arrangement. Desjardins Global Asset Management Inc., an affiliate of Desjardins Group, is set to acquire all of Guardian's issued and outstanding Common shares and Class A shares, excluding certain shares held by specific shareholders with equity rollover agreements, for C$68.00 per Guardian Share in cash.

data.title: Cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum dip as Trump's comment on Iran war sparks uncertainty in investors.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin experienced a decline in sync with the stock market as investors assessed varying reports on whether Iran is inclined to resolve tensions in the Middle East.

data.title: Tesla Touts Lower EV Delivery Estimate. The Stock Is Falling.
data.description: Tesla's Q1 delivery estimate, as compiled by analysts, is lower than other consensus forecasts. This has caused Tesla's stock to decline, although it has shown an overall increase for the week. The company is touting this lower estimate in Electric Vehicle (EV) deliveries.

data.title: Cirrus Logic Stock Breaks Out On Apple Partnership
data.description: Shares of Cirrus Logic surged following the announcement that Apple had chosen the fabless chipmaker to be part of its American Manufacturing Program. The partnership with Apple caused Cirrus Logic's stock to experience a significant increase in value. This news led to a breakout for Cirrus Logic's stock, indicating positive market sentiment and investor interest. The collaboration with Apple has potentially opened up new opportunities for Cirrus Logic, solidifying its position in the industry.

data.title: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. – Announcement of Availability of 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. (OET) disclosed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Interested parties can access the Annual Report on the SEC’s website or find it on OET’s Investor Relations segment on their website. For physical copies of the audited financial statements, individuals can request them free-of-charge by contacting OET via email at ir@okeanisecotankers.com or by sending a written request to Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. located at Ethnarchou Makariou av. & 2 D. Falireos st., 18547 Neo Faliro, Greece. OET trades on the NYSE under the symbol ECO and on the OSE under the symbol OET.

data.title: Getty Images Receives Notice from NYSE Regarding Continued Listing Standard
data.description: Getty Images Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: GETY) revealed that on March 17, 2026, it was informed by the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) that it does not meet the requirement of maintaining an average closing share price of $1.00 over a continuous 30-day trading session, as stipulated by Section 802.01C of the NYSE Listed Company Manual.

data.title: StorageVault Announces Normal Course Issuer Bids for Common Shares and Debentures
data.description: On March 19, 2026, StorageVault Canada Inc. (SVI-TSX) disclosed it has been conditionally approved by the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) to proceed with a Normal Course Issuer Bid (NCIB). The bid allows for the purchase and cancellation of their own shares over a 12-month span commencing on March 23, 2026. This bid signifies the company's intention to repurchase a certain number of its shares to potentially influence their market value.

data.title: DEMIRE closes the 2025 financial year in line with expectations despite a challenging market environment
data.description: DEMIRE has concluded the 2025 financial year as anticipated, showcasing resilience amidst a tough market setting. The company reported rental income of EUR 53.5 million and FFO I of EUR 10.1 million.

data.title: Meta Stock Slides As Court Losses Bring 'Big Tobacco Moment' Comparisons
data.description: The stock of Meta plummeted as it faced consecutive court defeats, leading to parallels drawn to the "Big Tobacco moment" in social media. The back-to-back losses caused Meta's stock to slide significantly.

data.title: Michael Saylor Spent A Decade Doing 'Everything Under The Sun,' But Still Couldn't 'Get Ahead' — Success Hit When He Understood This One Thing
data.description: Michael Saylor's journey towards investing all-in on Bitcoin was filled with challenges, as he revealed in an interview on Nov. 18, 2024. Having spent a decade at his firm, previously known as MicroStrategy, Saylor expressed feeling "despair" after dedicating 20,000 man-years trying various strategies without success. Despite acknowledging his intelligence and work ethic, Saylor admitted that setbacks had led to self-doubt. This highlights the mental toll that prolonged struggles can have on individuals, even those with proven abilities. Visit Benzinga.com for the complete story.

data.title: Dallas Drive Rallies to Capture the 2026 Pro Cheer League Season Title
data.description: In an exhilarating finish to the inaugural Pro Cheer League season, Dallas Drive overcame a challenging first half to make a remarkable comeback. Emerging victorious, they secured the league championship title in Nashville, Tennessee on March 29, 2026. Dallas Drive's impressive performance saw them surpass Miami Metal, becoming the league's first champions. The game showcased Dallas Drive's resilience and determination, as they demonstrated a remarkable shift in momentum to claim the title. The win marks an important milestone in the team's journey, highlighting their strength and prowess in the competitive league. The championship victory solidifies Dallas Drive's position as a formidable force in the Pro Cheer League, setting a high standard for future seasons.
